name: Tiny Lemony Turnovers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with mixer on medium speed, beat together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg until well combined.
3. Add the flour and baking powder to the mixture and beat at low speed until just mixed.
4. Flatten the dough into a disk shape and refrigerate, wrapped in plastic wrap, for 1 hour until firm.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Work with half of the dough at a time, keeping the remainder refrigerated.
7. Roll out the dough to an 1/8-inch thick between two sheets of wax paper or plastic wrap and cut into 2-inch squares.
8. In a small bowl, stir together the ricotta cheese, confectioners' sugar, and lemon peel until smooth.
9. Spoon 1 teaspoon of the ricotta mixture into the center of half of the dough squares.
10. Brush the edges with beaten egg white.
11. Top with the remaining dough squares and use a fork to seal the edges.
12. Brush the tops with egg white and sprinkle with multicolored nonpareils.
13. Bake for 12-15 minutes.
